<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <base target="_top">
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Archivo:wght@500;600;700;800;900&family=Lato:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    :root {
      --ink: #14110E;
      --bg: #FFFFFF;
      --paper: #F7F6F3;
      --line: #E1DFD9;
      --line-strong: #14110E;
      --muted: #6E6A62;
      --accent: #8B1E2D;      /* SESSIONS maroon, used sparingly */
      --error: #8B1E2D;
    }

    * { box-sizing: border-box; }

    html, body {
      margin: 0; padding: 0;
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--ink);
      font-family: 'Lato', -apple-system, sans-serif;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    }

    body { padding: 0 20px 84px; }
    .wrap { max-width: 640px; margin: 0 auto; }

    /* ---- Masthead ---- */
    .masthead {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 34px 0 22px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
      margin-bottom: 40px;
    }
    .logos { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 22px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .logos .logo-tii { height: 66px; width: auto; }
    .logos .logo-leap { height: 50px; width: auto; }
    .logos .logo-sep { width: 1px; height: 46px; background: var(--line); display: inline-block; }
    .masthead .kicker {
      display: block;
      margin-top: 18px;
      font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif;
      font-size: 11px;
      letter-spacing: 0.32em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    /* ---- Header block ---- */
    .eyebrow {
      font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif;
      font-size: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 0.22em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--accent);
      font-weight: 700;
      margin: 0 0 16px;
    }
    h1 {
      font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 900;
      font-size: clamp(36px, 7vw, 58px);
      line-height: 0.98;
      letter-spacing: -0.015em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin: 0;
    }
    .subtitle {
      font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: clamp(17px, 3vw, 22px);
      line-height: 1.25;
      color: var(--ink);
      margin: 14px 0 0;
      max-width: 30ch;
    }
    .standfirst {
      font-size: 17px;
      line-height: 1.6;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin: 20px 0 0;
      max-width: 58ch;
    }

    .factline {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      margin: 28px 0 0;
      padding: 14px 0;
      border-top: 2px solid var(--line-strong);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
      font-size: 13.5px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    }
    .factline span { padding-right: 18px; margin-right: 18px; border-right: 1px solid var(--line); }
    .factline span:last-child { border-right: none; margin-right: 0; padding-right: 0; }
    .factline strong { color: var(--ink); }

    .notice {
      margin-top: 26px;
      padding: 16px 18px;
      background: var(--paper);
      border: 1px solid var(--line);
      border-left: 3px solid var(--ink);
    }
    .notice .price {
      font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 800;
      font-size: 17px;
      letter-spacing: 0.01em;
      color: var(--ink);
    }
    .notice p { margin: 7px 0 0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--muted); }

    /* ---- Form ---- */
    form { margin-top: 42px; }

    .section-label {
      font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 0.14em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 10px 0;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--line-strong);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    }
    .section-label:not(:first-of-type) { margin-top: 40px; }
    .section-body { margin-top: 22px; }

    label {
      display: block;
      font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      color: var(--ink);
    }
    label .req { color: var(--accent); }
    label .opt { color: var(--muted); font-weight: 400; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0; }

    .field { margin-bottom: 22px; }

    input[type="text"], input[type="email"], input[type="url"], textarea {
      width: 100%;
      background: var(--bg);
      border: none;
      border-bottom: 1.5px solid var(--line-strong);
      border-radius: 0;
      color: var(--ink);
      font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif;
      font-size: 16px;
      padding: 10px 2px;
      transition: border-color 0.15s ease;
    }
    input::placeholder, textarea::placeholder { color: #B7B3AA; }
    /* Field widths sized to content; all collapse to full width on mobile */
    .w-xs { max-width: 120px; }
    .w-sm { max-width: 280px; }
    .w-md { max-width: 360px; }
    .w-lg { max-width: 480px; }
    input:focus, textarea:focus { outline: none; border-bottom-color: var(--accent); border-bottom-width: 2px; }
    textarea { min-height: 96px; resize: vertical; line-height: 1.5; }

    .err { font-size: 13px; color: var(--error); margin-top: 6px; display: none; font-weight: 700; }
    .field.invalid input, .field.invalid textarea { border-bottom-color: var(--error); }
    .field.invalid .err { display: block; }

    /* ---- Agreement ---- */
    .agree {
      display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;
      background: var(--paper);
      border: 1px solid var(--line);
      padding: 16px;
      margin-top: 30px;
    }
    .agree input { margin-top: 2px; width: 17px; height: 17px; accent-color: var(--ink); flex-shrink: 0; }
    .agree label { display: inline; margin: 0; font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--muted); letter-spacing: 0; }
    .agree label strong { color: var(--ink); font-weight: 700; }
    #agreeErr { display: none; margin-top: 8px; }
    #agreeErr.show { display: block; }

    /* ---- Button ---- */
    button {
      width: 100%;
      margin-top: 28px;
      background: var(--ink);
      color: #fff;
      border: none; border-radius: 0;
      font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-size: 14px;
      padding: 16px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 0.15s ease;
    }
    button:hover { background: #000; }
    button:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
    button:focus-visible, input:focus-visible, textarea:focus-visible, .agree input:focus-visible {
      outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 3px;
    }

    /* ---- Banner + confirmation ---- */
    .banner {
      display: none;
      background: #F7E9EA; border: 1px solid var(--error); color: #6E1622;
      padding: 12px 14px; font-size: 13.5px; margin-bottom: 22px; font-weight: 700;
    }
    .confirm { display: none; padding: 26px 0 8px; text-align: center; }
    .confirm .logos { margin-bottom: 22px; }
    .confirm .logo-tii { height: 50px; }
    .confirm .logo-leap { height: 38px; }
    .confirm h2 { font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: -0.01em; font-size: 30px; margin: 0 0 12px; }
    .confirm p { color: var(--muted); font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.65; max-width: 52ch; margin: 0 auto; }

    footer { margin-top: 46px; padding-top: 20px; border-top: 1px solid var(--line); color: var(--muted); font-size: 13px; text-align: center; }

    @media (max-width: 480px) {
      .masthead { margin-bottom: 30px; }
      .factline span { border-right: none; padding-right: 0; margin-right: 0; width: 100%; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="masthead">
      <div class="logos"><img class="logo-tii" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="The Independent Investor"><span class="logo-sep"></span><img class="logo-leap" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Leap Studios"></div>
      <span class="kicker">Sessions: Disrupt</span>
    </div>

    <p class="eyebrow">Live Event · Registration</p>
    <h1>Jevons Paradox</h1>
    <p class="subtitle">Can Philippine outsourcing survive the AI efficiency trap?</p>
    <p class="standfirst">A live, unfiltered war room on AI, labor, and the future of the Philippine economy. Seats are limited — every registration is reviewed before a seat is confirmed.</p>

    <div class="factline">
      <span><strong>Tue · Aug 25, 2026</strong> · 6:00–9:00 PM</span>
      <span>Leap Studios, Makati</span>
      <span>The Independent Investor &amp; Leap Studios</span>
    </div>

    <div class="notice">
      <div class="price">Seat price: ₱500 + VAT</div>
      <p>Nothing is charged now. Registering enters you into review — if your registration is approved, we'll email you instructions to pay via GCash or bank transfer and confirm your seat.</p>
    </div>

    <div id="banner" class="banner"></div>

    <form id="regForm" novalidate>
      <p class="section-label">Who you are</p>
      <div class="section-body">
        <div class="field" data-field="fullName">
          <label>Full name <span class="req">*</span></label>
          <input type="text" name="fullName" autocomplete="name" class="w-md">
          <p class="err">Please enter your full name.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="field" data-field="company">
          <label>Company / organization <span class="req">*</span></label>
          <input type="text" name="company" autocomplete="organization" class="w-lg">
          <p class="err">Please enter your company or organization.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="field" data-field="role">
          <label>Role / title <span class="req">*</span></label>
          <input type="text" name="role" autocomplete="organization-title" class="w-sm">
          <p class="err">Please enter your role or title.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="field" data-field="linkedin">
          <label>LinkedIn URL <span class="opt">optional</span></label>
          <input type="url" name="linkedin" placeholder="https://linkedin.com/in/yourname" class="w-lg">
          <p class="err">That doesn't look like a valid link. Please include https:// — or leave this blank.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="field" data-field="email">
          <label>Contact email <span class="req">*</span></label>
          <input type="email" name="email" autocomplete="email" class="w-md">
          <p class="err">Please enter a valid email address.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <p class="section-label">Why you're coming</p>
      <div class="section-body">
        <div class="field" data-field="questions">
          <label>What questions or topics do you want addressed at this session? <span class="req">*</span></label>
          <textarea name="questions" placeholder="e.g. How should BPO firms budget for AI tooling vs. headcount over the next 3 years?"></textarea>
          <p class="err">Please share a question or topic.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <p class="section-label">A bit more context</p>
      <div class="section-body">
        <div class="field" data-field="industry">
          <label>Industry <span class="req">*</span></label>
          <input type="text" name="industry" placeholder="e.g. IT-BPM, Real Estate, Venture Capital" class="w-md">
          <p class="err">Please enter your industry.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="field" data-field="experience">
          <label>Years of experience <span class="req">*</span></label>
          <input type="text" name="experience" placeholder="e.g. 8" class="w-xs">
          <p class="err">Please enter your years of experience.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="field" data-field="referral">
          <label>How did you hear about this event? <span class="req">*</span></label>
          <input type="text" name="referral" placeholder="e.g. LinkedIn, referred by a friend" class="w-md">
          <p class="err">Please let us know how you heard about the event.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="agree" data-field="agree">
        <input type="checkbox" name="agree" id="agree">
        <label for="agree">
          <strong>I understand my registration is pending final review and seat availability.</strong>
          If approved, I commit to paying <strong>₱500 + VAT</strong> via GCash or bank transfer to confirm my seat. <span class="req">*</span>
        </label>
      </div>
      <p class="err" id="agreeErr">Please check the box to confirm you understand the review and payment process.</p>

      <button type="submit" id="submitBtn">Submit registration</button>
    </form>

    <div class="confirm" id="confirm">
      <div class="logos"><img class="logo-tii" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="The Independent Investor"><span class="logo-sep"></span><img class="logo-leap" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Leap Studios"></div>
      <h2>You're on the list</h2>
      <p>Your registration is now pending final review and seat availability. If you're approved, we'll email you at the address you provided with next steps and a payment link to confirm your seat.</p>
    </div>

    <footer>Questions about your registration? Reach out to roncastro@theindependentinvestor.ph.</footer>
  </div>

  <script>
    // ============================================================
    // PASTE YOUR APPS SCRIPT WEB APP URL BETWEEN THE QUOTES BELOW.
    // It is the long link ending in /exec from Deploy > Manage deployments.
    // ============================================================
    const WEB_APP_URL = 'https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbwJm-OrjzJzkfThFZIOXddTYi68FiN_OwHwT-tEA0aNRox92MrMDaYIXa4aN22G_y_L/exec';

    const form = document.getElementById('regForm');
    const banner = document.getElementById('banner');
    const confirmPanel = document.getElementById('confirm');
    const submitBtn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');
    const agreeErr = document.getElementById('agreeErr');

    function clearErrors() {
      document.querySelectorAll('.field.invalid').forEach(f => f.classList.remove('invalid'));
      agreeErr.classList.remove('show');
      banner.style.display = 'none';
    }
    function markInvalid(name) {
      const field = form.querySelector('[data-field="' + name + '"]');
      if (field) field.classList.add('invalid');
    }
    function validate(data) {
      let ok = true;
      const requiredText = ['fullName','company','role','email','questions','industry','experience','referral'];
      requiredText.forEach(key => { if (!data[key] || data[key].trim() === '') { markInvalid(key); ok = false; } });
      const emailPattern = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
      if (data.email && !emailPattern.test(data.email)) { markInvalid('email'); ok = false; }
      const urlPattern = /^https?:\/\/.+/i;
      if (data.linkedin && !urlPattern.test(data.linkedin)) { markInvalid('linkedin'); ok = false; }
      if (!data.agree) { agreeErr.classList.add('show'); ok = false; }
      return ok;
    }
    form.addEventListener('submit', function (e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      clearErrors();
      const fd = new FormData(form);
      const data = {
        fullName: (fd.get('fullName')||'').trim(),
        company: (fd.get('company')||'').trim(),
        role: (fd.get('role')||'').trim(),
        linkedin: (fd.get('linkedin')||'').trim(),
        email: (fd.get('email')||'').trim(),
        questions: (fd.get('questions')||'').trim(),
        industry: (fd.get('industry')||'').trim(),
        experience: (fd.get('experience')||'').trim(),
        referral: (fd.get('referral')||'').trim(),
        agree: fd.get('agree') === 'on'
      };
      if (!validate(data)) return;
      submitBtn.disabled = true;
      submitBtn.textContent = 'Submitting…';

      // Send the registration to the Apps Script web app, which writes it
      // into the Google Sheet. The body is sent as plain text on purpose:
      // it keeps this a "simple" cross-site request so the browser doesn't
      // block it. Apps Script parses it back into JSON on the other side.
      fetch(WEB_APP_URL, {
        method: 'POST',
        body: JSON.stringify(data)
      })
        .then(function (res) { return res.json(); })
        .then(function (out) {
          if (out && out.status === 'ok') {
            form.style.display = 'none';
            confirmPanel.style.display = 'block';
          } else {
            throw new Error((out && out.message) || 'Unexpected response');
          }
        })
        .catch(function (err) {
          submitBtn.disabled = false;
          submitBtn.textContent = 'Submit registration';
          banner.textContent = 'Something went wrong submitting your registration: ' +
            (err && err.message ? err.message : err) + '. Please try again, or email roncastro@theindependentinvestor.ph.';
          banner.style.display = 'block';
        });
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>
